CustomField.description: Number of days the complaint is past its expected resolution date
CustomField.formula: IF( AND( NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Closed')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Resolved')), NOT(ISPICKVAL(Status__c, 'Cancelled')), NOT(ISBLANK(Expected_Resolution_Date__c)), TODAY() > Expected_Resolution_Date__c ), TODAY() - Expected_Resolution_Date__c, 0 )
CustomField.label: Days Overdue
